This is one of the newest models MSI has in its catalog, powered by AMD’s latest and greatest Ryzen 9 9955HX3D processor. Today’s deal lands as one of the first offers we’ve tracked for this particular model, and it’s a solid one at that, shaving a meaningful amount off the launch price and making it a bit easier on the wallet. While it’s not exactly a budget gaming laptop, it still offers a great value for the hardware you’re getting, especially considering that similarly configured systems – even those running previous-generation Ryzen chips – are currently priced well above the $3,000 mark at Best Buy. Head below for more details.

items.summary:
Baseus Enercore 10,000mAh power bank with built-in 45W retractable USB-C cable

Buy for $20 (Reg. $40)

Apply BSU8RIKP during checkout.

What we love

Power banks with retractable USB-C cables offer a convenient way to keep your devices charged on the go without needing to carry a separate cord. I used a similar battery pack during a recent trip, and all I had to do was pull the cable out from the power bank inside my backpack, then simply release it to let it retract neatly once I was done charging. The unit highlighted here offers a similar experience with a 10,000mAh battery and can deliver up to 45W of output to your device.
